text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So, Kitasan Black, you finally arrive! I am<n>the
extraordinary Magical Girl Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And I am the mastermind pulling herstr— Ahem. I'm her supporting scientist,Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You told me you want the chance to<n>help other
people, right? Well, look no<n>further...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm naming you Magical Black, newest<n>member of
the Magical Girl ☆ Sweepy 5!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yep! You'll have nothing to fear 'cause I,<n>a future
great witch, am going to teach<n>you about magic!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And I'll be experimenting on y—er, I'd<n>like to
request your cooperation in<n>testing "magical
items."

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, if I become a magical girl, I'll be<n>able to
save people who are in trouble,<n>just like in an
anime, right?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You've got to let me join! And it'd be<n>great if Dia
could join, too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
"Magical Dia"... That doesn't sound half<n>bad! ♪
Her name's a good fit—she's in!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Another guinea pi—another memberwould be splendid. I'm sure my researchwill benefit greatly.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A serum to dramatically increase muscle<n>mass or...
a mood-elevating tonic to<n>make you feel you can
accomplish<n>anything... Which shall I have you test<n>
first?
